mapper.select:
SELECT id, question, answer, sort_order, is_visible, create_time FROM faq
AND question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq (question, answer, sort_order, is_visible, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{question}, #{answer}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
